# Fixture for test_journal_mutation_validator.py — NOT a real .py file.
# Contains patterns that the journal-append-only-validator should flag.

# 1. open(journal.log, "w") — direct write mode
f1 = open("path/to/journal.log", "w")

# 2. open(journal.jsonl, "a") — append mode also banned outside writer.py
f2 = open("journal.jsonl", "a")

# 3. open(journal.log, "r+") — read-write mode enables seek+write
f3 = open("journal.log", "r+")

# 4. Path("journal.log").write_text("data")
from pathlib import Path
Path("journal.log").write_text("some data")

# 5. os.replace(tmp, "journal.log")
import os
os.replace("/tmp/some.tmp", "journal.log")

# 6. seek+write anti-pattern
def bad_seek_write():
    f = open("/tmp/foo", "rb+")
    f.seek(0)
    f.write(b"overwrite")

# 7. os.lseek + os.write anti-pattern
def bad_lseek_write(fd):
    os.lseek(fd, 0, 0)
    os.write(fd, b"overwrite")
